name: Brodetto Fish Stew
tagline: Adriatic fish stew with tomato, white wine, garlic, parsley — no shellfish
highlight: Classic Adriatic fisherman's stew, made shellfish-free

hero.alt: Brodetto fish stew with white fish in tomato broth
hero.caption: brodetto — adriatic stew

healthFacts: Multiple white fish varieties together give layered flavor without shellfish.
Tomato + olive oil + fish = classic Mediterranean diet pillars.

steps.title: Sweat aromatics
steps.detail: Heat olive oil in a wide pot. Sweat onion and fennel 8 min until soft. Add garlic, chili flakes 1 min.
steps.tip: Fennel adds a sweet anise note — distinct from celery.

steps.title: Wine, then tomato
steps.detail: Pour in wine; reduce by half, 4 min. Add tomatoes and stock; simmer 15 min until thickened.
steps.tip: Reducing the wine first concentrates its flavor.

steps.title: Slip in the fish
steps.detail: Cube fish into 2-inch pieces. Salt. Slip into broth, cover, simmer 6 min until just cooked. Don't stir — shake the pot.
steps.tip: Hardest fish goes in first; soft varieties last.

steps.title: Plate and parsley
steps.detail: Ladle into bowls. Drizzle olive oil, scatter parsley. Serve with crusty bread.
steps.tip: Toasted bread rubbed with garlic at the bottom of the bowl is the move.
